sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model: Clicking gray cells had no effect. Level still not reset. Greens gone.
Plan: Try moving the purple character with arrow keys to see if it triggers level completion or resets the level.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
def get_centers(seg, color):
    nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == color]
    centers = []
    for n in nodes:
        center = (sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']), sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']))
        centers.append(center)
    return centers

seg = current_frame.segmentation
greens = get_centers(seg, 'N')
orange = get_centers(seg, 'O')
purple = get_centers(seg, 'p')  # purple
print(f"Orange: {orange}, Greens: {greens}, Purple: {purple}")

# Try moving purple character with arrow keys
# Try RIGHT first
print("Moving purple RIGHT...")
action([{'action': 'RIGHT'}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
purple = get_centers(seg, 'p')
print(f"Purple: {purple}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Try moving purple UP
print("Moving purple UP...")
action([{'action': 'UP'}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
purple = get_centers(seg, 'p')
print(f"Purple: {purple}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Try moving purple RIGHT again
print("Moving purple RIGHT...")
action([{'action': 'RIGHT'}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
purple = get_centers(seg, 'p')
print(f"Purple: {purple}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Try ACTION7
print("Trying ACTION7...")
action([{'action': 'ACTION7'}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
greens = get_centers(seg, 'N')
purple = get_centers(seg, 'p')
print(f"Purple: {purple}, Greens: {greens}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
